mapper.sql: select attachment_id, session_id, message_id, user_id, file_name, original_name, file_url, mime_type, file_size, storage_type, status, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from sc_qa_attachment
mapper.insert: insert into sc_qa_attachment(session_id, message_id, user_id, file_name, original_name, file_url, mime_type, file_size, storage_type, status, delete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values(#{sessionId}, #{messageId}, #{userId}, #{fileName}, #{originalName}, #{fileUrl}, #{mimeType}, #{fileSize}, #{storageType}, #{status}, #{deleteTime}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_qa_attachment session_id = #{sessionId},message_id = #{messageId},user_id = #{userId},file_name = #{fileName},original_name = #{originalName},file_url = #{fileUrl},mime_type = #{mimeType},file_size = #{fileSize},storage_type = #{storageType},status = #{status},delete_time = #{deleteTime},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where attachment_id = #{attachmentId}
